dualaxes.gui.hurtmessage: Heal up quickly to recover from the severe injury.
skill.dualaxes.dualaxe.tooltip:
A Skill that makes you hold 2 axes at the time
You can now have 2 axes making you way stronger than any dualable weapon
Which also overrides the old one-handed axe style into a souls-like one.
skill.dualaxes.spinning_death.tooltip:
IM COMING FOR YOU GARY!!!.
This skill will execute a fast spinning animation causing fear for the enemies ahead.
